productDisplayName: Nike Men Sweet Classic Leather White Shoes
description: This tennis-inspired vintage style nike Sweet Classic Leather shoe is a perfect fusion of high street fashion and court glam. Designed for the tennis lover, these shoes blend function and fashion effortlessly, to make you look fabulous on and off the court.UpperLeather upper with nike swoosh overlays on the midfootMildly padded collar with an embroidered logo on the backLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue for comfortSynthetic leather and mesh fabric lining for comfort and breathable comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for advanced cushioningOutsoleHerringbone grooves on the durable rubber outsole for enhanced grip and tractionLeaf patterned herringbone grooves on the forefoot for better grip during toe offShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
